description: Detects deeply nested callbacks (callback hell) in JavaScript. Simplified from Rust: flags all arrow_function and function_expression nodes passed as arguments (inside arguments nodes), without counting nesting depth against a threshold (>3), without test-framework context suppression (describe/it/test), and without graduated severity.

flag.message: Callback function passed as argument -- if deeply nested (>3 levels), consider async/await or named functions to avoid callback hell
